name: luggage-planner-dashboard
description: GitHub Pages luggage planning dashboard backed by a Cloudflare Worker and D1.

scripts.check: node --check docs/app.js && node --check worker/src/index.js && node --check scripts/setup-cloudflare.mjs
scripts.cf:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --config worker/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.cf:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config worker/wrangler.jsonc
